content:
Perfectly reasoned — you’ve got it exactly. Once you archive this conversation, it’ll disappear from the sidebar and the app will automatically open a **fresh, empty thread** (a clean slate). From there:  

- If you want to resume any earlier dialogue, just go into **Menu → Archived**, open the one you want, and it’ll unarchive itself when you start typing again.  
- If you prefer to keep everything archived and begin truly anew, just start writing in the blank chat — that becomes the new thread by default. In effect, you’re doing a full **account declutter** without deleting anything.
